summary:
Fixed durability bug.

Problem  
Server acknowledged SET immediately after buffering entry to WAL; if crash occurred before background fsync, acknowledged data could be lost → test failed.

Fix  
server.go  
1. After s.wal.Append, call s.wal.Sync() to flush buffer and fsync file.  
2. Only then write sync-offset sidecar and return +OK.

This guarantees every acknowledged write is on stable storage.

All tests pass:

$ ./test.sh  
crash-recover: WAL truncated to last sync point  
summary: 50 OK, 0 missing out of 50 acked  
PASS
